title: Chinese Teacher (Sec/Pri) - 中学/小学老师
description:
加入大地学堂，共创趣味中文教学新天地！

关于我们：

我们是一家充满活力的新创教育团队，致力于为中学与小学生打造有趣又富有意义的中文学习旅程。通过充满互动和创意的课程，我们希望激发孩子们对中文的热爱与兴趣。我们正在寻找一位热情洋溢、有创意的中文补习老师加入我们，一同塑造孩子们的学习体验。

你的角色：

作为我们的中文教师，你不仅是知识的引导者，更是点燃学生好奇心和学习热情的点灯人。你将：

🔹 创意教学：发挥你的教学创意，让课堂变得有趣又有活力！用创新的方法将传统中文课转变为充满探索与乐趣的学习之旅。
🔹 课程设计：设计并开发适合中学，小学, 有文化内涵的中文课程，贴近孩子的生活与兴趣。
🔹 互动学习：通过游戏、动手活动和讨论，让学生主动参与学习，提升他们的表达能力与信心。
🔹 目标导向：明确教学目标，让学生理解每堂课的意义，并激励他们努力进步。
🔹 持续成长：参与教研、培训和团队脑力激荡，不断提升教学方法与理念。

我们希望你具备：

✔ 教育背景：拥有中文、教育或相关专业的文凭或学士学位。
✔ 课程熟悉度：了解并能融会贯通新加坡教育部（MOE）中学或小学华文课程内容。
✔ 教学经验：有教学经验者优先，但我们更重视你的热忱与创意！
✔ 弹性时间：能够在傍晚和周末上课，适应初创教育团队的时间安排与变化。

为什么加入我们？

✨ 创意自由：你可以发挥你的教学理念，把想法化为现实，真正影响孩子的学习体验。
🚀 充满活力的环境：在创新与成长兼具的团队中工作，每一个人的努力都被看见与重视。
💛 快乐与满足：在教学中找到成就感，看见孩子们因为你而热爱中文，是最美好的回报。


如果你准备好加入我们，让学习中文成为孩子们一生难忘的旅程，欢迎你联系我们！


Join Our Exciting New Venture as a Chinese Language Teacher!


About Us:

We're a dynamic startup on a mission to make learning Chinese an exciting and enriching experience for primary school students. Our goal is to inspire a love for the language through engaging lessons and interactive curriculum. We’re looking for a talented and enthusiastic Chinese Tuition Teacher to join our team and help shape our students' learning journey.


Your Role:

As our Chinese Language Teacher, you’ll be the guiding star in our students' educational voyage. Your role is not just to teach but to create memorable and interactive learning experiences that spark curiosity and enthusiasm for the Chinese language. Here’s what you’ll be doing:

  • Innovative Teaching: Bring your creative flair to the classroom! Use innovative teaching methods to make learning Chinese fun and engaging, transforming traditional lessons into exciting adventures.
  • Curriculum Planning: Design and develop a vibrant curriculum that captures the essence of the Chinese language and culture, tailored to the needs and interests of Secondary or Primary school students.
  • Active Learning: Prepare and deliver lessons that not only teach but also involve students in hands-on activities, games, and interactive discussions.
  • Goal Setting: Clearly communicate learning objectives, helping students understand the ‘why’ behind each lesson and motivating them to achieve their best.
  • Growth Mindset: Participate in workshops, seminars, and team brainstorming sessions to keep our teaching methods fresh and forward-thinking.

What We’re Looking For:

  • Education: You have a Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Chinese Language, Education, or a related field.
  • Syllabus Savvy: You’re familiar with the Singapore Secondary or Primary Levels MOE syllabus and can seamlessly integrate it into your lessons.
  • Experience: Previous teaching experience is a bonus, but your enthusiasm and creative energy are what truly matter!
  • Flexibility: You’re ready to work evenings and weekends to accommodate our students' schedules and be adaptable to a startup environment.

Why Join Us?

  • Creative Freedom: Bring your ideas to life and make a real impact on our students' learning experiences.
  • Dynamic Environment: Be part of an innovative startup where your contributions are valued and growth opportunities abound.
  • Fun and Fulfillment: Enjoy a rewarding role that combines your passion for teaching with the joy of seeing students excel.

If you’re ready to embark on this exciting journey with us and make learning Chinese an unforgettable adventure, we’d love to hear from you!

postedCompany.name: DA DI LEARNING STUDIO PTE. LTD.
